compiled_state.title: [test-create-dso-app.sh]: brew install failure scenarios -> 9 test failures blocking CI and release
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
### 2. Incident Overview

* **Scenario Type:** User-Flagged Behavior

#### Expected Behavior

test-create-dso-app.sh tests for missing dependency + brew install failure scenarios should pass in CI. The release script (scripts/release.sh) should be runnable.

#### Actual Behavior

9 tests fail in test-create-dso-app.sh in CI, causing the CI workflow to return 'failure'. This in turn causes validate.sh --ci to report ci(main): FAIL, which blocks scripts/release.sh at precondition 8 (validate.sh --ci must pass).

Failing tests:
- FAIL: missing git (brew install fails): exits non-zero
- FAIL: missing git: brew install git called automatically
- FAIL: missing python3 (brew install fails): exits non-zero
- FAIL: missing python3 (brew install fails): listed in output
- FAIL: missing docker+colima (brew install fails): exits non-zero
- FAIL: missing docker+colima (brew install fails): colima listed in output
- FAIL: colima start failure: WARNING emitted in output
- FAIL: missing ast-grep/sg (brew install fails): exits non-zero
- FAIL: missing ast-grep/sg (brew install fails): listed in output

### 6. Logs

CI run ID: 24684595217
Total: PASSED: 4393  FAILED: 9
Only test-create-dso-app.sh had failures.

comments.body: Gate 1a: skipped — CLI_user tag present; intent-aligned assumed
comments.author: Test
